title: This $2 low-tech upgrade just made Russia's cheap 'cardboard-and-plywood' drone almost unjammable
summary: Russian engineers have reportedly fitted a basic magnetic compass onto the cheap Molniya attack drone to counter satellite jamming. The modification could therefore help the Molniya continue following a general course after electronic warfare systems interfere with satellite navigation.
